title: This Flamingo Wants To Know…
excerpt: I mean seriously, right? Happy World Emoji Day! Had some yellow paper on my desk leftover from a shoot and had to use my favorite new Tombow brush pens and the flamingo from this pack of inflated ephemera to draw…
body:
I mean seriously, right? Happy World Emoji Day!

Had some yellow paper on my desk leftover from a shoot and had to use my favorite new Tombow brush pens and the flamingo from this pack of inflated ephemera to draw this up.
